description:
You are a gym operations manager using wger at http://localhost. The gym has decided to discontinue the '5x5 Beginner' program as it is being replaced by a new onboarding routine. Delete the workout routine named '5x5 Beginner' from the system while keeping all other routines, such as 'Push-Pull-Legs' and 'Upper-Lower Split', intact.

Credentials:
- Username: admin
- Password: adminadmin
